generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow American who's seen a lot in my lifetime, I worry about how much we're spending on civil defense that doesn't actually protect us. My grandkids' school did a drill last month - they spent hours in the basement while 'experts' told us it was just routine. Meanwhile, our taxes keep going up for these 'preparedness' programs that seem more about keeping bureaucrats employed than keeping us safe. I've lived through real crises, and I know what works: common sense, not expensive gimmicks. #RealSecurity #TaxpayerFirst
